name: WONG
title: THE ENCHANTER

abilities.name: Wise Words of Wisdom
abilities.text:
Cursed Warnings: Reduce the value of (c) cards by 2 that are flipped (not cheated) by enemies within 8" with a Glowy token.

Illusions: Attack actions of enemy models within 8" without a TN gain a TN of 12.

The Card Is In Your Pocket: At the start and end of this model's activation, it may look at the top card of the opponent's deck and may discard it.

actions.name: Sparkle Bomb
actions.effects: The target gains a Glowy token. For each raise this action receives, this model may have another model within range gain a Glowy token.

triggers.name: Glitter Lungs
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to each model that gained a Glowy token from this action.

actions.name: "The Glow is Healthy!"
actions.effects: Remove up to three Glowy tokens from models within 8" of the target. The target heals 2, +1 for each Glowy token removed. If this action receives a raise, place the target within 6" of its current location.

triggers.name: Set Charge
triggers.text: Make a Pyrotechnic marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Chain Fuse
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Models within (r)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Glowy token. Then, if this action did not receive a raise, remove the marker.

triggers.name: Extra Boom Powder
triggers.text: Once per activation. When resolving, increase the TN by 2.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE ENCHANTER' back='The Enchanter'
extraction_notes: Flying Piglet (3) appears in the totem position but is also listed as a separate ability with no text - this may indicate it is the totem name with model limit 3
